ACME CORP ANNUAL REPORT 2024

Item 1. Business

Acme Corp designs and sells industrial widgets across North America.
Revenue grew on strong datacenter power demand and electricity demand.
We remain exposed to copper and aluminum input costs.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Acme Corp faces supply chain risk and commodity price exposure.
Margins were pressured by rising electricity costs.
The company is exposed to copper price volatility.

Item 7. Management Discussion

Capital expenditure rose to support new transmission projects.
We are sensitive to interest rate movements and inflation.
Acme Corp is located in Canada and operates across North America.
